## Topics

### Program Overview

  - [5-month program: Prep (1 month), Body (3 months), Brain (1 month) phases](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [8 coaching calls total, 30 minutes each](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Optional longevity phase after initial 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Client Health Concerns

  - [Marcel: Weight gain, low energy, stress/anxiety, neurotoxicity, autoimmune symptoms, very low testosterone (176)](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Nadia: PCOS, severe sleep apnea (28/28 severity), GI distress/bloating, gut issues](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Supplementation

  - [Core supplements shipping soon (aiming for Monday delivery)](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

  - [Most are 3 caps/day; Mitomethylator is 2 caps/day](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Gut Enhancer best on empty stomach; others can be taken with/without food](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Start with 1 cap/day, work up to full dose](https://fathom.video/share/LYsmqydpo-4mnxrnfQBRw9UTbtsrEXsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
